name: Intentional Grantor Trust for Tax Efficiency

eligibility.description: Available to individuals creating irrevocable trusts where the grantor or a nonadverse party retains the power to distribute income to the grantor/spouse or pay insurance premiums.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: By intentionally triggering grantor trust status (e.g., allowing income to pay for life insurance premiums), the grantor pays the trust's tax liability, effectively making a tax-free gift to beneficiaries.
